Municipalities populated under all provinces. Isla de la Juventud remains an ADM1 special municipality and therefore has no ADM2 child row in this file.
Municipalities populated under all provinces plus one municipality row under Distrito Nacional.

Full ADM2 build under all 15 counties using the district layer.

No ADM2 rows were forced. São Tomé and Príncipe uses districts as the only administrative subdivisions, so this ancestry model should flow from ADM1 district/autonomous region directly to ADM3 towns, cities, and settlements.

Added the current 15 Tobago House of Assembly electoral districts under the Tobago ADM1 ward. A countrywide ADM2 layer was not forced for the Trinidad municipal corporations in this batch because the next clean layer is mixed by corporation and better handled in a later targeted pass or at ADM3 community level.
Selective ancestry-focused ADM2 seed under the included states using municipalities tied to Afro-Atlantic, trade, and migrant community mapping; not an all-municipality state rollup.

Selective ancestry-focused ADM2 seed under the included provinces using major census divisions, regional districts, and county-equivalent divisions relevant to diaspora settlement; not a full province-by-province census-division inventory.

Selective ancestry-focused ADM2 seed under the included states and DC using counties and county-equivalent units around major Black Atlantic, Afro-diasporic, and Igbo-diaspora settlement corridors; not a full nationwide county rollup.
Selective municipality seed built under the included districts and autonomous regions only, focused on high-signal diaspora and migration-linked municipalities.
Full province layer built under the included autonomous communities only: Andalusia, Basque Country, Canary Islands, Catalonia, Community of Madrid, and Valencian Community.

Selective ancestry-focused UK seed built under the included ADM1 constituent countries only: England uses selected counties / metropolitan counties, Scotland uses selected council areas, and Wales uses selected principal areas.
Full ADM2 build under provinces and Western Area using the current 16-district structure.
